case_title: RASAKI SALAU VS. RICHARD DIBONA et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ALBERT S. WOOD, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-23-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-07-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY DEBORAH NEVILLE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
